studio.heading: Absolute Dance website template options.
studio.intro: Open the available homepage direction to review the overall feel, layout, and parent journey. Additional options can be added here as they are prepared.

templates.label: Demo 1
templates.title: Warm Modern Enrollment
templates.description: A family-centred redesign with a polished parent journey and real Absolute Dance imagery.

templates.label: Demo 2
templates.title: Conversion Journey
templates.description: A conversion-focused homepage direction with a bolder stage hero, clear parent actions, and real Absolute Dance imagery.

templates.label: Demo 3
templates.title: Editorial Feature
templates.description: A print-magazine profile of the studio with large serif type, numbered feature sections, and editorial photo plates.

templates.label: Demo 4
templates.title: Program Pathways
templates.description: A hub-style homepage organized around three clear parent decision pathways, with rich class cards, a weekly schedule snapshot, faculty grid, and inline contact form.
templates.source: Claude-generated demo with kcdancehq.com.au as structural reference, 2026-05-26
